BulkDetails.Name: Molybdenum
BulkDetails.Description: Refractory metal with good thermal and electrical conductivity, used as an alloy additive in steel and in semiconductor applications.

BulkDetails.Name: Molybdenum (Mo)
BulkDetails.Description: A refractory metal with high melting point, often called 'the vitamin of steel' as an alloy additive. It is a key material in the semiconductor industry.

BulkDetails.Name: Niobium
BulkDetails.Description: Silver-white refractory metal with high ductility and superconductivity at low temperatures, used in superconducting materials and high-temperature applications.

BulkDetails.Name: Niobium (Nb)
BulkDetails.Description: A silvery-white, highly ductile rare metal. Its most outstanding property is complete superconductivity at very low temperatures, making it the core of widely-used superconducting materials.

BulkDetails.Name: Rhenium
BulkDetails.Description: Extremely rare refractory metal with high density and strength, used as an additive in superalloys for aerospace engines and in high-temperature thermocouples.

BulkDetails.Name: Rhenium (Re)
BulkDetails.Description: One of the rarest stable metals on Earth, with the third-highest melting point. A key additive for nickel-based superalloys, the 'Re effect' significantly enhances high-temperature strength.

BulkDetails.Name: Tantalum
BulkDetails.Description: Rare refractory metal with high density, excellent corrosion resistance and biocompatibility, used in medical implants and electronics.

BulkDetails.Name: Tantalum (Ta)
BulkDetails.Description: A rare metal with a very high melting point and exceptional resistance to acid corrosion. It has excellent biocompatibility, making it a core material for medical implants.

BulkDetails.Name: Tungsten
BulkDetails.Description: Refractory metal with the highest melting point, excellent high-temperature strength and thermal conductivity, used in aerospace, cutting tools, and electronics.

BulkDetails.Name: Tungsten (W)
BulkDetails.Description: A refractory metal with the highest melting point of all metals, known as the 'king of melting points'. It has high density, excellent high-temperature strength, and corrosion resistance.
